exercises.title: Sentence Practice
exercises.description: Type each sentence without looking at the keyboard.

solution.code:
The best error message is the one that never shows up.
First solve the problem then write the code.
Simplicity is prerequisite for reliability.
The most dangerous phrase is we have always done it this way.
Programming is not about typing it is about thinking.
Code is like humor when you have to explain it it is bad.
It works on my machine works on mine too
